rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §276.019 governs election procedure alterations and has no bearing on tax exemption thresholds.
quote: A public official or election official may not create, alter, modify, waive, or suspend any election standard, practice, or procedure mandated by law or rule in a manner not expressly authorized by this code.
_note: Rule text addresses election procedures only; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption change.
